titles.EN: The New Sales Campaign Just Dropped!

今年的促销形式是！.say: 港区·指挥室
说起来，今天这个日期，好像是……
没错喵，又到了一年一度的那个日子了喵！
指挥官，请看宣传片喵~！

sequence: 【这里写第一句宣传词，注意字数限制二十五个字】
【这里写第二句宣传词，注意字数限制二十五个字】

今年的促销形式是！.say: ……喵？资、资源好像放错了喵？！
【画面切换到都市实景】【插入一阵强劲的音乐】
【画面再次切换，接入演员宣传】
啊……稍微有点喝多了头有点晕……
还好之后可以后期配音，现在把口型和节奏对上就好……
尽量保持自然的不要看镜头，尽可能保持自然地说出台词……
契卡洛夫小姐，你今天买的商品真是太实惠了。
你是从哪里买到这么实惠的商品的呢？
都是明石今年准备的促销商品哦，别的不说，酒水部分是真的很实惠……值得一试哟~
【高级轿车即将驶过，镜头聚焦过去】
哇哦~Honey快看，我正在马路上飙车哦！
整片街区都因为拍摄封锁了，现在可以自由自在享受疾驰的快乐哦？！
咳，新泽西小姐……说词。
哦对……Honey，Honey！今年明石小姐的促销也是实惠满满哦！
之后我们一起去看看吧~！
……台词里好像不是这么写的，你是真心觉得明石促销实惠的？
嗯？难道不是吗？！
她甚至有每日免费礼物派送欸！
这一点倒确实……一个好传统得到了延续……
当然喵！
今年也是一场省掉其他一切环节，从根本上实实在在地让利喵！
限定换装返场、促销期间的超值限定礼包，明石也全都准备好了喵！
那么，让我们相约在促销之日喵~！
【镜头切换到明亮的天空，收尾结束】
明石去更换宣传片资源了喵——！
指挥官今年也请看传单，千万不要错过这次大好机会喵~！
在留下了一摞促销传单后，一道绿色闪电如去年一般急速离开了指挥室。
今天的指挥室又要成为她的订单自取处了……
也罢，一年一度的促销日……
工作结束之后，去看看好了——

The New Sales Campaign Just Dropped!.say: Port - Office
Wait a second. Is today...
That's right, nya! It's that time of year again, nya!
Commander, get a load of my promo video, nya!
Nya...? I-I mixed up the files, nya!
[Overhead view of city. Music dramatically surges]
[Swap cameras to introduce actors]
Urgh, my head is spinning... I might've had a little too much to drink.
Good thing we're dubbing over it in post. If I can just lip sync my lines right, I'm good.
Don't look at the camera, speak as naturally as possible...
Ms. Chkalov, tell me again how you got those goodies for such a discount!
Where in the world can I get an awesome deal like that?
These are all from Akashi's big promotional sale. The drinks are practically a steal... You should TOTALLY check them out!
[Luxury car enters scene. Camera zooms]
Wooow, honey, look! I rule the road now!
Just ignore the fact that it's closed for filming, so I'm the only person who gets to drive on it anyway!
AHEM. New Jersey, your lines?
Oh, riiight... Honey! I heard Akashi's holding another big Black Friday sale this year!
Let's go check it out later!
That was ad-libbed, wasn't it? You don't... actually think these are good deals, do you?
Huh? You don't think so?!
But she has daily giveaways!
I will admit, that is one tradition that I appreciate.
You heard right, nya!
This year, we're trimming all the fat and delivering all the savings straight to YOU yet again, nya!
We've got returning outfits, limited-time special sets, and more, nya!
See you on the day of the sale, nya!
[Camera pans up to the blue sky. End]

options.content: It was... memorable, I'll give you that.
That was novel. Maybe not in a good way.

The New Sales Campaign Just Dropped!.say: I'll go grab the right files right now, nya!
Make sure you read the flyers again, nya! Or else you might miss the opportunity of a lifetime, nya!
After leaving a bundle of flyers, she bolts out of my office like a flash of green lightning.
Turning my office into an ad space again, I see...
Well, I guess it is a special occasion.
After work, I'll go check it out.
